Package org.rodinp.internal.core

Class ElementTypeManager

java.lang.Object
org.rodinp.internal.core.ElementTypeManager
public class ElementTypeManager extends Object
Manager for Rodin element types.

Most element types are contributed by plugins through two extension points, one for file elements and one for internal elements. This singleton class manages the various contributions and provides a unique place for creating element handles for these types, using reflection.

    • getInternalElementType

      public InternalElementType<? extends IInternalElement> getInternalElementType(String id)
      Returns the internal element type with the given id.
      Parameters:
      id - the id of the element type to retrieve
      Returns:
      the element type or null if this element type id is unknown.

    • getFileAssociation

      public FileAssociation getFileAssociation(org.eclipse.core.resources.IFile file)
      Returns the file association of the given file or null if it is not a Rodin File.
      Parameters:
      file - the file to test
      Returns:
      the file association or null if it is not a Rodin file

    • isValidFileName

      public boolean isValidFileName(String fileName)
      Tells whether the given file name is valid for a Rodin File (that is corresponds to a declared file association).
      Parameters:
      fileName - the file name to test
      Returns:
      true iff the name is valid
